# kSecAttrIsSensitive

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s sensitivity.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrIsSensitive: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFBoolean]. When set to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanTrue], the item can only be exported in an encrypted format. Items of class [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassKey] have this attribute.
title: kSecAttrIsSensitive
